name: financeiroloja
description: Sistema financeiro para loja de roupas — projeto de portfólio (dev + automação de testes QA)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.test:e2e: npm run db:seed && npm run cy:run
